name: Tusmada Naxdinta
description: Tilmaanta hal-lambar ee degdega ah ee xasilloonida hemodynamic. Waxaa loo xisaabiyaa sida HR / SBP. Caadi ahaan waa 0.5-0.7.
instructions: U qaybi garaaca wadnaha cadaadiska dhiigga ee systolic. Tusmada shoogga ee kor u kacaya ayaa muujinaya xumaan.

scoring.label: Naxdin khafiif ah -- si dhow ula soco
Naxdin dhexdhexaad ah -- gelitaan IV, dareerayaal
Naxdin daran -- kicin degdeg ah, wax soo saarka dhiigga

obstetric.note: Tusaha shoogga dhalmada (OSI) waxay isticmaashaa isla qaacido isku mid ah. SI> 0.9 bukaanada uurka leh ayaa muhiim ah. HR ee caadiga ah ayaa ka sarreeya uurka (80-100 bpm).
